{{CargoOrgan
|name=Odd Prefrontal Cortex
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10827
|idx=28
|description="…By week three of the injections, the apes began wielding firearms, organizing units, and launching assaults on staff. Upon dissecting the leader, we found its prefrontal cortex grotesquely enlarged…" 
—Superbrain Files
|skill=
|hp=1386
|def=83
|atk=98
|rush=98
|gene1=During exploration, Earth DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, INTEL gained +2.5%
|gene3=In exploration, 2% chance to gain 2x Treasure Maps
|gene7=In explorations, INTEL gained +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
